description_long: This is a weathered red barn with a classic gable roof covered in corrugated metal sheeting, showing signs of age and exposure with visible rust and discoloration. The front features a large, open rectangular entrance, suitable for vehicles or livestock, with no visible doors attached. One side wall is adorned with a graffiti-style mural depicting a cartoon character and the letters 'KE', adding an urban, repurposed feel to the structure. The barn's siding consists of vertical panels, some of which are heavily worn and stained, contributing to its rustic appearance. There are no visible windows on any side, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The base appears to be a concrete or stone foundation, providing stability and durability.
description: A weathered red barn with a gable metal roof, large open front entrance, and graffiti art on one side. The structure has vertical panel siding and no visible windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large open entrance and vertical red siding with weathered patches.
description_view_1: Side view featuring graffiti art of a cartoon character and the letters 'KE' on the red, weathered siding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying solid vertical red siding with heavy weathering and no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with plain, weathered red siding and no graffiti or openings.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with corrugated metal panels
attribute_door_style: single large open entrance, no visible doors attached
attribute_window_arrangement: no windows visible on any side
